mapper.sql: id, task_id, task_code, environment, execution_id, status, trigger_type, trigger_user, start_time, end_time, error_message, delete_flag, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task_execution (task_id, task_code, environment, execution_id, status, trigger_type, trigger_user, start_time, end_time, error_message, created_by) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskCode}, #{environment}, #{executionId}, #{status}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerUser}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM df_task_execution WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM df_task_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_execution WHERE delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM df_task_execution WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task_execution SET status = #{status}, end_time = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'STOPPED') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE end_time END, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND delete_flag = 0
